package rulecoverage

func NegativeRouteParamNameAndDtoFieldNameDriftWithoutMappingHelper() string {
    ruleID := "route_param_name_and_dto_field_name_drift_without_mapping_helper"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated manual renaming between route params and DTO fields that lacks a shared mapper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
